name: Honeycomb MCP
description: Hosted MCP server letting AI assistants query Honeycomb observability data, analyse telemetry datasets, inspect alerts, and cross-reference production traces with code.

skills.name: Query Observability Data
skills.description: Run natural language queries against Honeycomb datasets across multiple environments and return structured telemetry results.

skills.name: Alert and Dashboard Analysis
skills.description: Retrieve and summarise active alerts, SLOs, and dashboards to help AI assistants diagnose production incidents in context.

skills.name: Code-Production Cross-Reference
skills.description: Correlate live production behaviour from Honeycomb traces with the codebase to surface likely root-cause code paths.
